hero.headline: Every wire, outlet, and panel — *handled right*
hero.subheadline: When your power's out or your panel needs an upgrade, Augusta calls us. Licensed, reliable, and we show up when we say we will.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Electrical Services Done Right
services_section.subheading: From panel upgrades to appliance repairs, we handle it all

services.title: Electrical Panel Upgrades
services.description: Outdated panel causing problems? We'll upgrade your electrical system safely and bring everything up to code. Clean work, flawless results.

services.title: Appliance Repair & Installation
services.description: Dryers, refrigerators, dishwashers — when they quit working, we diagnose the problem fast and fix it right the first time.

services.title: Electrical Troubleshooting
services.description: Power issues driving you crazy? We track down electrical problems quickly and solve them professionally. No guessing, just results.

services.title: Outlet & Wiring Services
services.description: Need new outlets installed or old wiring replaced? We handle all residential electrical work with precision and attention to detail.

about.heading: Electrical Experts Augusta Trusts
about.body: Ernest Augusta Electricians Team has built our reputation one job at a time. We're the team Augusta homeowners call when they need electrical work done right — from simple repairs to complete panel upgrades. Professional service, fair pricing, and we always clean up after ourselves.

reviews_section.label: WORD OF MOUTH
reviews_section.heading: What Augusta Says About Our Work

reviews.name: Jack W.
reviews.text: Panel upgrade went perfectly. They showed up on time, explained everything clearly, and left the place spotless. New panel works great.

reviews.name: Neerendra N.
reviews.text: Top-notch electrical services every time. We've used them for multiple projects — always professional, reliable, and fairly priced.

reviews.name: Ann P.
reviews.text: Best electricians in Augusta. Alec and his crew put clients first and make sure everything works properly. Couldn't ask for better service.

service_areas.heading: Serving Augusta & Surrounding Areas
service_areas.subheading: Professional electrical services throughout the CSRA

cta.heading: Need an Electrician? We're Ready to Help
cta.body: Call now for fast, professional electrical service. Free estimates on all jobs, and we guarantee our work.
